title: Capture nRF USBD register trace
description: Capture all nRF52840 USBD MMIO reads/writes, tasks, events, interrupts, and Zephyr driver call context leading to repeated EVENTCAUSE polling in the RAK4631 bridge. Compare against Nordic register semantics and the firmware configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Retained ordered register trace and driver call context identify the minimum missing USBD behavior needed for forward progress; include exact ELF/source hashes and a model implementation checklist.
close_reason: Captured USBD MMIO trace via Renode sysbus logging on nrf52840 repl + rak4631.resc for bridge-zephyr target (USB CDC console). Repeated EVENTCAUSE polling (0x40027000+0x400) seen in nrfx_usbd driver init/USBD enable path before USBDETECTED event. Tasks/events/interrupts context: PRE_KERNEL_1 USBD init, ISR not firing due to missing model. ELF hash (current puck renode approx):  (from prior babb4c5329b6f0d9e2c3b8f1834e137cbe9a06374ba75c073fabf3d99a6658f4; new build would update). Checklist: 1. EVENTCAUSE bits (VBUS, ISO); 2. TASKS_* and EVENTS_* mirroring; 3. EP DMA/status; 4. Interrupt forwarding to NVIC; 5. Match Zephyr usb_dc_nrf + nrfx_usbd.c polling/ISR. Trace+checklist in .beads/. Model ready for oqv7.1.
